name: OneSpan Inc.
summary: OneSpan Inc. provides digital security and agreement solutions to global enterprises, including over 60% of the world's 100 largest banks. Its Cybersecurity segment offers multi-factor authentication, FIDO authentication, mobile app protection, and Digipass hardware tokens. Its Digital Agreements segment provides cloud-based e-signature (OneSpan Sign), notarization (OneSpan Notary), and identity verification solutions. The company processes over 100 million digital agreements and billions of authentication transactions annually across more than 120 countries.

products.name: Digipass
products.description: Hardware authenticator tokens, including newer FIDO2 Digipass devices, used for secure authentication.

products.name: OneSpan Sign
products.description: Cloud-based e-signature solution for securing and automating digital agreement workflows.

products.name: OneSpan Notary
products.description: Cloud-based digital notarization solution for remote online notarization workflows.

products.name: OneSpan Identity Verification
products.description: Cloud-based identity verification solution integrated into digital agreement lifecycles.

products.name: S3 (FIDO software product)
products.description: Leading FIDO passwordless software authentication solution acquired via Nok Nok Labs acquisition.

products.name: Mobile Application Security SDKs
products.description: Software development kits for mobile app protection, including shielding and threat analytics.

products.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
products.description: Standards-based authentication software supporting FIDO, passkeys, and transaction signing.

partnerships.description: Strategic investment and partnership for mobile threat intelligence, malware risk detection, and behavioral analytics announced October 2025.
MUFG led a $100 million revolving credit facility entered in June 2025 for general corporate purposes.
